franky  1.1.4
A High-Level Motion API for Franka
Classes | Typedefs | Enumerations | Functions

Classes

class  CartesianState

 A template class representing a dynamics limit with a maximum value. More...

 Elbow state of the robot. More...

 Exception thrown by the gripper class. More...
 
class  Gripper
 A wrapper around the franka::Gripper class that adds asynchronous functionality. More...
 
class  JointState
 Joint state of a robot. More...
 
class  Model
 A wrapper around franka::Model that uses Eigen types. More...
 
struct  CartesianReference
 Cartesian impedance reference expressed in the base frame. More...
 
struct  CartesianImpedanceGains
 
struct  PostureTask
 Joint-posture objective projected into the Cartesian nullspace. More...
 
struct  ManipulabilityTask
 Manipulability maximization objective projected into the Cartesian nullspace. More...
 
struct  NullspaceGains
 Runtime-adjustable gains for a nullspace task. More...
 
class  CartesianImpedanceBase
 Base class for client-side cartesian impedance motions. More...
 
class  CartesianImpedanceMotion
 Cartesian impedance motion. More...
 
class  CartesianImpedanceTrackingMotion
 Cartesian impedance tracking motion. More...
 
class  CartesianMotion

class  CartesianWaypointMotion

struct  JointReference
 Joint-space reference for joint impedance motions. More...

struct  JointImpedanceParams
 Parameters for joint impedance motions. More...
 
class  JointImpedanceBase
 Base class for client-side joint impedance motions. More...
 
class  JointImpedanceMotion
 Client-side joint impedance controller. More...
 
class  JointImpedanceTrackingMotion
 Client-side joint impedance controller with a dynamic online reference. More...
 
class  JointMotion

class  JointVelocityMotion

class  JointVelocityWaypointMotion

class  JointWaypointMotion

class  Measure
 A measure on the robot state. More...
 
class  Reaction
 A reaction that can be attached to a motion. More...
 
class  Motion
 Base class for motions. More...
 
struct  ReactionRecursionException
 Exception thrown when the reaction recursion limit (8) is reached. More...
 
class  MotionGenerator
 Helper class for handling motions and reactions. More...
 
struct  PositionWaypoint
 A position waypoint with a target and optional parameters. More...
 
class  PositionWaypointMotion
 A motion following multiple positional waypoints in a time-optimal way. Works with arbitrary initial conditions. More...
 
class  StopMotion
 
class  StopMotion< franka::JointPositions >
 Stop motion for joint position control mode. More...

 Stop motion for joint velocity position control mode. More...

 Stop motion for cartesian pose control mode. More...

 Parameters for the torque-control stop motion (StopMotion<franka::Torques>). More...

 Graceful stop for torque-control (impedance) motions. More...

struct  FrictionCompensationParams
 
class  VelocityWaypointMotion
 A motion following multiple positional waypoints in a time-optimal way. Works with arbitrary initial conditions. More...
 
struct  MotionPlannerException
 Exception thrown if the motion planner fails. More...

 A waypoint with a target and optional parameters. More...
 
class  WaypointMotion
 A motion following multiple waypoints in a time-optimal way. Works with arbitrary initial conditions. More...
 
class  RelativeDynamicsFactor
 Relative dynamics factors. More...
 
struct  InvalidMotionTypeException
 Exception thrown when an invalid motion type is used. More...
 
struct  MotionReuseException
 Exception thrown when a motion is started more than once. More...

using NullspaceTask = std::variant< PostureTask, ManipulabilityTask >
 
using ImpedanceMotion = CartesianImpedanceBase
 
using CartesianReferenceHandle = WaitFreeTripleBuffer< std::optional< CartesianReference > >
 Double-buffered handle for updating a CartesianReference online. More...
 
using JointReferenceHandle = WaitFreeTripleBuffer< std::optional< JointReference > >
 Double-buffered handle for updating a JointReference online. More...

using VelocityWaypoint = Waypoint< TargetType >

using Vector6d = Eigen::Vector< double, 6 >
 
using Vector7d = Eigen::Vector< double, 7 >
 
using Jacobian = Eigen::Matrix< double, 6, 7 >
 
using IntertiaMatrix = Eigen::Matrix< double, 3, 3 >
 
using Matrix6d = Eigen::Matrix< double, 6, 6 >
 
using Affine = Eigen::Affine3d
 
template<size_t dims>
using Array = std::variant< std::array< double, dims >, Eigen::Vector< double, dims > >
 
template<size_t dims>
using ScalarOrArray = std::variant< double, Array< dims > >

Typedef Documentation

◆ Affine

using franky::Affine = typedef Eigen::Affine3d

◆ Array

template<size_t dims>
using franky::Array = typedef std::variant<std::array<double, dims>, Eigen::Vector<double, dims> >

◆ CartesianReferenceHandle

using franky::CartesianReferenceHandle = typedef WaitFreeTripleBuffer<std::optional<CartesianReference> >

Double-buffered handle for updating a CartesianReference online.

This handle is intended to be written from a user thread while a single CartesianImpedanceTrackingMotion is running. The motion reads the latest valid reference each control cycle without needing to replace the motion object.

◆ ImpedanceMotion

using franky::ImpedanceMotion = typedef CartesianImpedanceBase

◆ IntertiaMatrix

using franky::IntertiaMatrix = typedef Eigen::Matrix<double, 3, 3>

◆ Jacobian

using franky::Jacobian = typedef Eigen::Matrix<double, 6, 7>

◆ JointReferenceHandle

using franky::JointReferenceHandle = typedef WaitFreeTripleBuffer<std::optional<JointReference> >

Double-buffered handle for updating a JointReference online.

This handle is intended to be written from a user thread while a single JointImpedanceTrackingMotion is running. The motion reads the latest valid reference each control cycle without needing to replace the motion object.

◆ Matrix6d

using franky::Matrix6d = typedef Eigen::Matrix<double, 6, 6>

◆ NullspaceTask

using franky::NullspaceTask = typedef std::variant<PostureTask, ManipulabilityTask>

strong

Enum class for reference types.

This enum class defines the reference types for motions (absolute or relative).

◆ patchMutexRT()

void franky::patchMutexRT ( std::mutex &  mutex)

Patch std::mutex to allow for priority inheritance.

Priority inheritance ensures that the thread currently holding this mutex receives the same priority as the highest priority thread waiting for it.

Parameters
mutexMutex to patch.
